Committee: Tourism, Parks, Arts And Sports Development

Milestones.Committee: Tourism, Parks, Arts And Sports Development

Actions.Text: REFERRED TO TOURISM, PARKS, ARTS AND SPORTS DEVELOPMENT

Title: Keeps professional sports franchises in their home communities
Summary: Keeps professional sports franchises in their home communities by requiring franchise owners offer the franchise for sale prior to relocating or eliminating the franchise.
LawCode: Add Title H Art 27 §§27.01 - 27.07, Arts & Cul L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the arts and cultural affairs law, in relation to keeping professional sports franchises in their home communities
